action.reasoning: Observation: ViT model achieved val acc 0.7512 but eval score was 0.4223 because eval used ResNet checkpoint/predict.py. The local test of predict_vit.py failed because /data/test.pt doesn't exist in training container - this is expected, it will exist during eval. Analysis: Need to submit ViT checkpoint with predict_vit.py. The predict_vit.py script is correct. Decision: Submit eval with final_vit.pt and predict_vit.py immediately to get the ViT score.
